title: Verify the screen displays 'You don't have any airMail yet.'
test_steps: Open the messaging app 'airMail'. | Verify the screen displays 'You don't have any airMail yet.'
expected_result: The screen should display 'You don't have any airMail yet.'

title: Verify the 'Send a friend a message now!' text is present.
test_steps: Open the messaging app 'airMail'. | Verify the text 'Send a friend a message now!' is present.
expected_result: The text 'Send a friend a message now!' should be present.

title: Verify the orange button with a plus sign is clickable.
test_steps: Open the messaging app 'airMail'. | Click on the orange button with a plus sign at the bottom right.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the message composition screen.

title: Verify the header/app bar icons are functional.
test_steps: Open the messaging app 'airMail'. | Click on the search icon in the header/app bar. | Click on the messages icon in the header/app bar. | Click on the notifications icon in the header/app bar. | Click on the settings icon in the header/app bar.
expected_result: Navigating to the search, messages, notifications, and settings screens should be successful.

title: Verify the message icon is functional.
test_steps: Open the messaging app 'airMail'. | Click on the message icon in the main content area.
expected_result: Navigating to the messages screen should be successful.

title: Verify data persistence when the app is closed and reopened.
test_steps: Open the messaging app 'airMail'. | Close the app. | Reopen the messaging app 'airMail'. | Verify the screen still displays 'You don't have any airMail yet.'
expected_result: The screen should still display 'You don't have any airMail yet.'

title: Verify the screen is accessible and usable.
test_steps: Open the messaging app 'airMail'. | Verify the screen is accessible and usable by a visually impaired user.
expected_result: The screen should be accessible and usable by a visually impaired user.

title: Verify the screen handles interruptions and resumes correctly.
test_steps: Open the messaging app 'airMail'. | Simulate an interruption (e.g., a phone call). | Resume the messaging app 'airMail'. | Verify the screen still displays 'You don't have any airMail yet.'
expected_result: The screen should still display 'You don't have any airMail yet.'
